places.name: Viking Ship Museum
places.description: Home to three historic ships from the age of Vikings.

places.name: Vigeland Sculpture Park
places.description: One man's exploration of the human form, including the bizarre and delightful "Man Attacked by Babies."

places.name: Emanuel Vigeland Mausoleum
places.description: An artist's mausoleum with a haunting echo.

places.name: Kon-Tiki Museum
places.description: Across the Pacific in a raft, a museum dedicated to Thor Heyerdahl's now legendary expedition.

places.name: Forest of the Future Library
places.description: One thousand trees were planted in Norway to be used to print books a century from now.

places.name: Grass Roots Square
places.description: Thousands of miniature bronze sculptures have taken over this city square creating a unique art installation.

places.name: The Mini Bottle Gallery
places.description: Tens of thousands of tiny bottles stuffed with various items.

places.name: Hrimnir Ramen
places.description: A microbiologist-chef is slinging noodles with hyperlocal Nordic ingredients.
